text:
TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: FORMAT: XX.XX (e.g., 5.91, 15.00), expressed in minutes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Range is from 5–30 minutes. The values for the raw variable were 5 minutes, 15 minutes, 30 minutes, 
and more than 30 minutes. Values of more than 30 minutes were coded as 30 minutes. CMS did not 
require bridge organizations to report navigation contacts in the AHC data system, so 
NE_NVGTR_AVG_CNTCT_MNTS_NUM may not reflect the duration of all
